body:
Fixes #26

## Summary

- Add Kate Mobile token acquisition, full VK redirect URL parsing, raw token support, token auto-save notifications, and an experimental localhost callback flow.
- Replace desktop start/stop controls with one run toggle, add background status tracking, and align the desktop mode switch and styling with the landing page.
- Update GitHub Pages downloads with language/theme-specific app previews, grouped primary/alternate artifact buttons, UI-first checksum verification, and one-row expandable sections.
- Preserve issue data, before screenshots, verification logs, and solution analysis in `docs/case-studies/issue-26`; add a patch changeset.

## Screenshots

English dark landing page with app preview:

![English dark landing page](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-26-13d5d785ff12/docs/screenshots/issue-26-pages-en-dark.png?raw=true)

Grouped downloads:

![Grouped downloads](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-26-13d5d785ff12/docs/screenshots/issue-26-downloads-verification.png?raw=true)

UI-first verification:

![UI-first verification](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-26-13d5d785ff12/docs/screenshots/issue-26-verification-ui.png?raw=true)

## Verification

- `npm test`
- `deno test --allow-read`
- `node --test tests/oauth-callback.test.js`
- `npm run check`
- `npm run build:renderer`
- `npm run build:site`
- `npm install --no-save --package-lock=false --no-audit --no-fund browser-commander@0.8.0 playwright@1.59.1`
- `npm run test:pages:e2e -- --site-dir site/dist`
- `node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs`
- GitHub Actions `JavaScript CI/CD` success: https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/actions/runs/25656364254

## Notes

The Pages e2e dependencies mirror the CI workflow and were installed locally with `--no-save`, so package metadata was not changed. A follow-up test-only commit keeps the localhost callback server test under Node because Deno CI intentionally runs without network permission.
title: Improve VK token flow and landing download UX
